description: Participants develop AI systems capable of novel abstract reasoning by learning to map input grids to output grids. The competition provides a dataset of visual pattern tasks where each example consists of a small grid of colored cells. Competitors must train models that generalize to unseen tasks with minimal examples, typically using a few-shot learning approach. Success is measured by a custom evaluation metric based on the Abstraction and Reasoning Challenge framework, which assesses the model's ability to correctly transform input patterns into the expected output patterns.
